_comment: Edit this file to make the scanner yours. Nothing else needs touching.
_experienceLevels_help: LinkedIn f_E codes: 1=Internship 2=Entry 3=Associate 4=Mid-Senior 5=Director 6=Executive. Leave [] to not filter by level.
_titleMustMatch_help: A job's title must contain at least one of these words (case-insensitive). Empty [] = keep all titles.
_titleExclude_help: Drop the title if it contains any of these words.
_jdExcludePatterns_help: OPTIONAL second pass: fetch each job's full description and drop it if any regex matches. Slower (one request per job). Empty [] = skip this pass entirely. Examples below — delete what you don't want.
